ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "county" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "totalvotes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "dem_vote_share" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "rep_vote_share" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Republican party */,
  "other_vote_share" REAL /* Percentage of votes for other parties */,
  "winning_party" TEXT /* Winning party in the election */,
  "republican_minus_democratic" REAL /* Difference in vote share between the Republican and Democratic parties */,
  "dem_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic party */,
  "rep_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican party */,
  "other_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for other parties */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., Presidential, Senate, House) */,
  "total_registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county for that election year */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast their votes */,
  "absentee_votes" INTEGER /* Number of absentee votes */,
  "early_votes" INTEGER /* Number of early votes */,
  "total_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast, including absentee and early votes */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Absolute difference in the number of votes between the winning party and the second-place party */,
  "runoff_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if a runoff election was required */,
  "runoff_winner" TEXT /* If a runoff was required, the party that won the runoff */,
  "runoff_margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* If a runoff was required, the margin of victory in the runoff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_fips FOREIGN KEY ("fips") REFERENCES counties ("fips_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the state */,
  "voter_turnout_statewide" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast their votes statewide */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "senators" TEXT /* Names of the current senators */,
  "last_election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the last major election */,
  "next_election_year" INTEGER /* Year of the next major election */,
  "political_trend" TEXT /* General political trend in the state (e.g., Republican, Democratic, Swing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "fips_code" INTEGER /* Federal Information Processing Standards (FIPS) code for the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the county */,
  "voter_turnout_countywide" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who cast their votes countywide */,
  "political_trend" TEXT /* General political trend in the county (e.g., Republican, Democratic, Swing) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the county (people per square mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
